data.name: DeleteProductSubtitle
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this product?

data.name: DeleteConfirmationAlert
data.value: This action cannot be undone. The product and all its associated information will be permanently deleted.

data.name: DeleteWarningMsg
data.value: This action cannot be undone. When deleting this product:

data.name: DeleteWarningLoseInfo
data.value: All product information will be lost

data.name: DeleteWarningLoseImages
data.value: All associated images will be deleted

data.name: DeleteWarningLoseReviews
data.value: All product reviews will be deleted

data.name: DeleteWarningNotAvailable
data.value: The product will no longer be available in the catalog

data.name: DeleteConfirmJs
data.value: Are you absolutely sure you want to delete this product? This action cannot be undone.
